characters.physical_details: Compact, dark-haired, and controlled, with a pale burn scar inside her left wrist and ink that never fully leaves her nails.
characters.occupation_status: Paid confidential operative for the Surete, posing as the widowed copyist Jeanne Morel.
characters.literacy_languages: Fully literate in French, trained in shorthand and police report style; no substantial languages beyond French.

state_transitions.change: Burns her cipher slips and loses her clean reporting channel to the Surete.
Suffers blast wounds to her left side and thigh in the tollhouse explosion.
Becomes Lucien's lover.
Burns her last report, refuses Vautrin the map, and is pushed out of the quarry's inner life after Lucien learns her role.
Leaves Paris under no stable identity after leaking the records.

characters.availability: Present throughout; wounded in chapter 13 and still healing when she leaves Paris, isolated from the refuge's inner decisions after chapter 15, alive at the end.

characters.physical_details: Lean, silvering, quarry-pale, with a chronic damp cough and a healed bullet scar high in his left shoulder.

key_relationships.gaspard_vautrin: State antagonist who wants him as a public culprit.
key_relationships.jules_ferrand: Intruder he dislikes before he can prove why.
key_relationships.lucie_rigal: Pupil who keeps the refuge human.

characters.occupation_status: Former schoolmaster turned underground organizer and shelter keeper, wanted under anti-anarchist surveillance.
characters.literacy_languages: Highly literate in French, educated in Latin, reads some German theory, writes legibly even when exhausted.

state_transitions.change: Becomes Elise's lover after the press move.
Passes his notebook of true names and dates to Elise in prison.
Captured during the quarry evacuation after staying behind to misdirect the police.
Dies in custody before his case can be meaningfully heard.

characters.availability: Present through chapter 16; imprisoned in chapter 17; dead by early chapter 18.

characters.physical_details: Broad-shouldered, red-handed from lye, hair pinned tight, with soap-roughened knuckles and a fast-reading face.

key_relationships.elise_valette: Sheltered stranger who becomes the betrayal inside the walls.
key_relationships.lucien_delatour: Political ally she respects and cleans up after.
key_relationships.abel_saintclair: Younger man she still feeds despite herself.
key_relationships.nadir_belkacem: Reliable coworker whose absence damages the household.
key_relationships.gaspard_vautrin: Face of the state pressure she survives.
key_relationships.jules_ferrand: Man she never trusts but cannot fully bar at first.

characters.occupation_status: Laundress, ration keeper, and practical quartermaster of the quarry refuge.
characters.literacy_languages: Reads slowly but accurately in French, keeps numbers well, signs her name in a blunt school hand.

state_transitions.change: Begins actively suspecting Elise after seeing her raid reflexes.
Finds Elise's Surete marker and learns her exact affiliation.
Forces Elise to answer to Elise Valette and strips her of trusted access inside the refuge.
Escapes the quarry with Lucie through the drainage passage.

characters.availability: Present through the evacuation; alive and hidden.

characters.physical_details: Narrow and unfinished, with printer's burns on two fingertips and clothes that never quite fit.

key_relationships.elise_valette: Newcomer he flirts with, mistrusts, and wants to impress.
key_relationships.clemence_rigal: Practical elder who feeds and scolds him.
key_relationships.nadir_belkacem: Older printer whose competence he envies.
key_relationships.gaspard_vautrin: State enemy he imagines more clearly than he understands.
key_relationships.jules_ferrand: Bad influence who offers him a script for importance.
key_relationships.lucie_rigal: Child who treats him as part older brother, part nuisance.

characters.occupation_status: Apprentice printer and sometime courier living intermittently in the quarry refuge.
characters.literacy_languages: Strong reader and compositor in French; quotes verse more readily than theory.

state_transitions.change: Steals Ferrand's satchel of gelignite and a pistol after Nadir's arrest.
Dies in the tollhouse explosion.

characters.physical_details: Tall and watchful, with a nicked left cheek, ink-darkened hands, and a habit of standing slightly side-on.

key_relationships.elise_valette: New arrival he reads faster than most, though not fast enough.
key_relationships.clemence_rigal: Coworker in the refuge's practical economy.
key_relationships.abel_saintclair: Younger compositor he needles and teaches.
key_relationships.gaspard_vautrin: State agent whose files and prisons threaten him.
key_relationships.jules_ferrand: Man he dislikes on sight and never fully believes.
key_relationships.lucie_rigal: Child he entertains with paper scraps and tiny folded animals.

characters.occupation_status: Compositor, translator, and occasional day laborer when police pressure allows.
characters.literacy_languages: Reads and writes French and Arabic; strongest compositor in the refuge.

state_transitions.change: Arrested during a public delivery run.
Reported dead in custody after an alleged escape attempt; body not returned.

characters.availability: Present through chapter 11; absent afterward; officially dead by chapter 14.

characters.physical_details: Meticulous and heavy-lidded, with barbered neatness and cuffs cleaner than the rooms he orders searched.

key_relationships.elise_valette: Handler who prefers leverage to loyalty.
key_relationships.lucien_delatour: Desired public culprit for a conspiracy case.
key_relationships.clemence_rigal: Practical woman the police file under infrastructure.
key_relationships.abel_saintclair: Useful example of youthful radical vanity.
key_relationships.nadir_belkacem: Arrested subject whose suffering is administratively acceptable to him.
key_relationships.jules_ferrand: Paid provocateur under his operational authority.
key_relationships.lucie_rigal: Collateral he notices only for leverage or optics.

characters.occupation_status: Inspecteur in the Prefecture's anti-anarchist section, with unofficial authority over confidential operatives and informers.
characters.literacy_languages: Fully literate in bureaucratic and legal French; dictates more reports than he handwrites.

state_transitions.change: Loses Elise's obedience and fails to obtain the quarry map.
Remains in office despite mild public embarrassment after the leak.

characters.availability: Present whenever state pressure enters the scene; alive and employed.

characters.physical_details: Dark moustache, restless grin, cheap cologne over stale sweat, and two badly healed knuckles.

key_relationships.lucien_delatour: Obstacle whose refusal of spectacle frustrates him.
key_relationships.clemence_rigal: Quartermaster who dislikes him but cannot initially prove why.
key_relationships.abel_saintclair: Young mark he flatters into danger.
key_relationships.nadir_belkacem: Skeptic who clocks his falseness almost immediately.
key_relationships.lucie_rigal: Child he ignores unless she happens to be in the way.

characters.occupation_status: Police-paid provocateur posing as an anarchist bomb courier.
characters.literacy_languages: Functionally literate in French for addresses and simple accounts; relies more on performance than writing.

state_transitions.change: Enters the quarry's orbit as a new operational influence.
Dies in the tollhouse explosion while trying to secure a useful outrage.

characters.availability: Present from chapter 4 through chapter 13; dead afterward.

characters.physical_details: Thin, alert, often half-finished in her grooming, with knees usually chalked or scraped from quarry life.

key_relationships.elise_valette: Dangerous adult she still half trusts because Elise once got her through a raid.
key_relationships.clemence_rigal: Mother and primary source of safety.
key_relationships.abel_saintclair: Older boy who amuses and disappoints her.
key_relationships.nadir_belkacem: Printer who makes folded-paper animals for her.
key_relationships.gaspard_vautrin: Distant threat she knows only through adult fear.

characters.occupation_status: School-age child living illegally in the quarry refuge.
characters.literacy_languages: Learning to read and write French through Lucien's lessons; can sign her name and sound out simple words by mid-book.

state_transitions.change: Established on the page as one of Lucien's pupils in the quarry schoolroom.
Escapes through the drainage passage with the civilians.

characters.availability: Present in the quarry through chapter 16; alive and hidden with Clemence afterward.

timeline.story_start: Late March 1895, Paris, with the lois scelerates newly widened and police eager for an anarchist case before the marches.
timeline.estimated_span: Roughly fourteen weeks, ending in early July 1895.

seasonal_track.season: Cold wet spring; rain aboveground, raw damp in the quarry.
Late spring warming into early summer; longer light aboveground, but the quarry remains cold and close.
Early summer heat aboveground; the underground turns airless and smoke hangs badly.

key_events.event: Vautrin assigns Elise to infiltrate the quarry refuge under the alias Jeanne Morel.
Elise enters the quarry after the courier is arrested in her place.
Elise omits Clemence and Lucie from her first report.
Elise burns her cipher slips during the raid aftermath.
Elise steals proof of Ferrand's police payments and the draft warrant, warns Lucien, and helps trigger the overnight press move.
Elise and Lucien become lovers after moving the press.
Nadir is arrested and Abel steals the gelignite.
Abel and Ferrand die in the tollhouse explosion; Elise is injured.
Clemence finds Elise's Surete marker and confirms her identity.
key_events.timing: A day after the tollhouse blast

key_events.event: The quarry is smoked and partially sealed; Lucien is captured while civilians escape.
Lucien dies in custody before hearing, and Elise publishes Ferrand's payments with corrected names for the dead before leaving Paris.

geography.primary_setting: The southern edge of Paris around Montrouge and the old Tombe-Issoire quarry network, with brief movement through police offices, market streets, and prison corridors aboveground.

key_locations.name: Prefecture anti-anarchist offices, Ile de la Cite
key_locations.details: Administrative nerve center where Vautrin briefs Elise and converts lives into paperwork.

key_locations.name: Wine shop cellar entrance on rue de la Tombe-Issoire
key_locations.details: Primary covert entrance to the quarry refuge; spilled wine above, damp chalk below.

key_locations.name: Quarry schoolroom
key_locations.details: White limestone chamber where Lucien teaches children and reads drafts aloud.

key_locations.name: Print chamber
key_locations.details: Crowded room with a copper hand press, type cases, ink, and the work of circulation.

key_locations.name: Sleeping gallery and ration room
key_locations.details: Shared domestic space of blankets, bread, soap, and Clemence's daily arithmetic.

key_locations.name: Laundry yard on the Bievre
key_locations.details: One of the refuge's few recurring daylight sites, full of steam, lye, and gossip.

key_locations.name: Disused tollhouse near Porte d'Orleans
key_locations.details: Half-ruined octroi house with a cramped cellar under the gate road.

key_locations.name: Mourning-ribbon shop reserve cache
key_locations.details: Aboveground safe site that receives the quarry's reserve money, forged papers, and seal after the Reine Talbot raid.

key_locations.name: Drainage outflow behind the dyer's wall
key_locations.details: Half-choked runoff route from below the ration room to a ditch near the Bievre; the civilians escape through it during the sealing.

key_locations.name: La Sante prison
key_locations.details: Site of Lucien's imprisonment and the final transfer from love plot to witness plot.

distances: The Prefecture to the Tombe-Issoire entrance is a long cross-city carriage ride or well over an hour on foot.
The wine cellar entrance to the schoolroom is a short descent followed by several tight quarry turns; strangers cannot navigate it alone at first.
The print chamber sits deeper than the sleeping gallery, which is why moving the press is punishing.
The laundry yard is aboveground and within walking distance of the refuge.
The tollhouse lies close enough for Abel to know it from courier work but far enough to feel separate from the main entrance.
The drainage outflow begins below the ration room and exits west behind a dyer's wall near the Bievre; adults barely fit the first squeeze.
La Sante prison reverses the quarry: enclosed, mapped, and state-owned.

world_rules: The anti-anarchist laws permit arrest for association, suspect printed matter, and sheltering wanted radicals; proof thresholds are elastic.
Elise's police role is deniable because women do not hold her position officially; Vautrin can use her and disclaim her.
Fast communication depends on letters, dead drops, street runners, and telegraph offices.
Police can use smoke, masons, and engineers to force underground refuges open or seal them without storming the tunnels directly.
The quarry tunnels are unstable, damp, and only partly mapped; smoke, collapse, darkness, and bad footing are as dangerous as armed force.
Newspapers aligned with the police can set public narrative long before any court tests facts.
Small sums of money matter; rent, soap, coal, bread, and institutional fees shape choices.

power_structure.over: Elise Valette and other confidential operatives
power_structure.mechanism: Salary, deniable immunity, and leverage over criminal records or family debts.
Cash payments, protection from prosecution, and operational authority.

power_structure.over: Quarry residents who seek political and practical guidance
power_structure.mechanism: Moral authority, teaching, and knowledge of hidden routes.

power_structure.over: Daily life in the quarry refuge
power_structure.mechanism: Control of food, bedding, laundry, ration math, and domestic trust.

power_structure.over: Radicals, migrants, and the poor around the quarry
power_structure.mechanism: Police surveillance, prison, paperwork, and the ability to define public truth through compliant papers.

objects.name: Surete brass marker
objects.origin: Issued by Vautrin as proof that Elise is an approved confidential operative.
objects.status: Hidden in Elise's dress hem until Clemence finds it in chapter 14.

objects.name: Cipher slips written in milk ink
objects.origin: Part of Elise's initial reporting kit.
objects.status: Burned in chapter 07 to preserve cover.

objects.name: Quarry map on linen backing
objects.origin: Copied from an older surveyor's record and updated by hand.
objects.status: Never surrendered to the state; by chapter 16 the route knowledge matters more than the object.

objects.name: Copper hand press
objects.origin: Salvaged from a shuttered radical print shop.
objects.status: Moved to a safer chamber in chapter 10 and left behind when the quarry is sealed in chapter 16.

objects.name: Biscuit-tin reserve cache with forged papers
objects.origin: Emergency reserve of 63 francs 40 centimes, forged papers, and seal kept under Clemence's bedding.
objects.status: Moved by Elise to the mourning-ribbon shop cache in chapter 09 after the Reine Talbot raid.

objects.name: Ferrand's satchel of gelignite and pistol
objects.origin: Supplied through the provocation channel meant to create a prosecutable outrage.
objects.status: Stolen by Abel in chapter 11 and destroyed in the tollhouse explosion in chapter 13.

objects.name: Lucien's notebook of true names and dates
objects.origin: Compiled from shelter records, burial scraps, prison notices, and corrections to official lies.
objects.status: Given to Elise in chapter 17; used to publish corrected names in chapter 18 and carried out of Paris with her.

debts.amount: 312 francs overdue by chapter 17, plus 28 francs due monthly.
debts.deadline: Immediate once Vautrin stops smoothing the account.
debts.status: Used as leverage against Elise from chapter 1 onward; only one extra month is paid in chapter 18.

debts.creditor: Coal and lamp-oil merchant serving the refuge's front addresses
debts.status: Managed by Clemence through partial payments, barter, and theft until the quarry is sealed.

income_sources.amount: 90 francs per month plus irregular bonuses.
income_sources.reliability: Reliable only while Vautrin considers her obedient.

income_sources.amount: 22 to 30 francs per month in uneven batches.
income_sources.reliability: Seasonal and easily interrupted by raids or illness.

income_sources.source: Nadir's day compositing and translation work
income_sources.amount: About 35 francs per month when he can move safely.
income_sources.reliability: Moderate until his arrest in chapter 11, then gone.

income_sources.amount: 35 francs on 12 April 1895, 40 francs on 2 May, and 60 francs on 14 May contingent on deliverable proof.
income_sources.reliability: Reliable while Ferrand remains useful to Vautrin; ends with Ferrand's death.

knowledge_state.knows: Vautrin wants a public conspiracy case, not merely accurate intelligence.
knowledge_state.hidden_from: Lucien Delatour, Clemence Rigal, Abel Saint-Clair, Nadir Belkacem, Lucie Rigal

knowledge_state.knows: Elise's alias, debt leverage, and exact reporting role.
Jules Ferrand is a paid provocateur, and Vautrin already has a draft deposition and warrant waiting on planted proof.
knowledge_state.hidden_from: Clemence Rigal, Abel Saint-Clair, Lucie Rigal

knowledge_state.knows: A secondary drainage route exists for civilians if the main entrances fail.
Jeanne Morel is lying about core parts of her identity, though he does not yet know she is Surete.
knowledge_state.hidden_from: Most quarry residents except perhaps Clemence Rigal

knowledge_state.knows: Jeanne Morel's raid instincts do not match her stated life.
He has taken Ferrand's satchel and means to force an event.
Nadir is being brutalized for usable testimony and permits it.
knowledge_state.hidden_from: Public press, Elise at first, and the quarry residents

knowledge_state.knows: Elise is a Surete operative and not Jeanne Morel, because of the brass marker.
Elise was assigned to infiltrate him specifically.
knowledge_state.hidden_from: No one once the rupture is spoken

knowledge_state.knows: Lucien's notebook contains corrected names and dates the state flattened or falsified.
knowledge_state.hidden_from: Gaspard Vautrin and the police apparatus

knowledge_state.knows: Publishing Ferrand's payment records beside the names of the dead can stain the official case.

environmental_constants: White limestone dust settles on hair, cuffs, blankets, and bread.
Water drips steadily in the deeper chambers, with carriage thunder overhead.
Lamp oil, wet wool, printer's ink, soap, and human breath mingle in enclosed rooms.
The quarry stays cold until summer turns it close.
Narrow passages force bodies near each other and keep voices low whether intimacy is wanted or not.
Around the Bievre, lye steam, river rot, horse sweat, and brief spring blossom share the same air.
